text:
TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 

122300000X: Dentist 
1223D0001X: Dentist — dental public health 
1223D0004X: Dentist — dentist anesthesiologist 
1223E0200X: Dentist — endodontics 
1223G0001X: Dentist — general practice 
1223P0106X: Dentist — oral and maxillofacial pathology 
1223P0221X: Dentist —
